original_file: Unlock the best features in Notion
email_subject: Unlock the best features in Notion
email_body:
Get access to Notion's premium features for free



Want the best of Notion? Start a free Business trial to unlock unlimited Notion AI. Get AI Meeting Notes that capture and summarize for you, Research Mode to gather and synthesize sources, and Notion AI connectors that pull context from your tools—plus more. You’ll also get a personal onboarding buddy in Agent to help you build what you need and set things up right.



Try AI Meeting Notes ( https://notion.so/?target=start_business_trial&utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+7+-Business+Trial&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Try unlimited AI ( https://notion.so/?target=start_business_trial&utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+7+-Business+Trial&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )



Free for 30 days. Cancel anytime.



Thanks,



The Notion Team



Write, plan, organize.

In one AI-powered workspace.



Notion ( https://www.notion.so/?utm_campaign=%5BUpdated%5D+Creator+Onboarding+2025&utm_campaignid=652&utm_campaigntype=transactional&utm_content=Email+7+-Business+Trial&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
